properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm one minute from my future home One step from the supper that my Lord has called I can see myself walking on those streets of gold That's why I'm sold out even raptured my soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: One minute away, from a thousand years (eternity) To my home, just over the hills I'm longing to see my Lord and guide (In me there's a groaning) to cross over to the other side

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've got my eyes on the promises of God That's why I'm dying out and surrendering my heart I know I can't make it in this present state That's why I'm getting all of Jesus before it's too late

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We don't have much longer on this earthly plane It's time to fervently pray in Jesus name Putting no trust (at all) in the arms of flesh You've gotta turn it over to Jesus, He'll do all the rest
